commit.message:
fix: image 404, console spam, duplicate keys, receipt vision

- Fix image thumbnail 404: skip _root_/ virtual paths in MessageBubble,
  use /uploads/ prefix for real storage paths
- Remove 12 console.log calls from AIChat.tsx (send/response/preview logs)
- Fix duplicate React key warning: deduplicate proposedTools in riskByTool
- Add Gemini Vision pre-processing for Copilot path: when image files are
  attached, extract text via gemini-2.0-flash before sending to Copilot SDK,
  enabling receipt OCR/verification for the Dominican Receipt Expert agent

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: dead code cleanup - remove 21 test/debug files, 2 unused exports

- Delete 10 debug_*.js/ts files at repo root (ad-hoc debugging scripts)
- Delete 11 test_*.js/ts files at repo root (one-off test scripts)
- Remove unused export initializeWorkflows() from actions.ts
- Remove unused export getAppDeployment() from actions.ts
- Remove unused SaveIcon import from Dashboard.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: extract AIChat state into useChatState hook

- Create src/hooks/useChatState.ts (641 lines) with useReducer-based
  state management replacing 71 useState hooks
- 11 logical slices: ui, chat, session, files, streaming, modals,
  prompts, copy, commands, settings, misc
- 27 action types with generic slice updaters and convenience actions
- 71 setter functions matching original API for zero-change callsites
- Preserve aiChatStateCache singleton for cross-render persistence
- AIChat.tsx reduced from 4015 to 3935 lines, cleaner state management

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: upgrade wave - AgentBuilder, workflow execution, dashboard tabs, AI settings

- Add AgentBuilder component with full agent config UI (identity, instructions,
  capabilities, behavior, test & deploy) with 4 pre-built templates
- Wire workflow execution into WorkflowDesigner with Run button, per-step
  status indicators (running/success/error), and result banner
- Add Workflows and Agents tabs to Dashboard with GitBranch and Bot icons
- Upgrade Settings AI tab with provider cards (Copilot primary, Gemini fallback),
  model catalog per provider with speed/quality ratings, personality selector
  with icons, temperature slider with labels, runtime architecture info panel

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

rename: m-team → feature-crew

Rename project throughout all docs, instructions, and templates.
Also add testability-first principle to architect agent.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add squad-lint squad and update squad-forge to v1.0.3 (#44)

* feat: add squad-lint squad and update squad-forge to v1.0.3

Part 1: Create squad-lint (v1.0.0)
- New squad for validating structural compliance of squads and skills
- Six validation phases: SKILL.md frontmatter, MANIFEST.md, hooks, CHANGELOG, SETUP.md, cross-file consistency
- Read-only operations using git-pr Mode C
- Depends on sop skill

Part 2: Update squad-forge (v1.0.1 → v1.0.3)
- Add debrief hint: prefer dispatching to squad-lint when opening PRs
- Add sop skill dependency
- Remove Output Schema section and related constraint

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct squad-lint debrief hint and add missing git-pr dependency

- Replace incorrect debrief hint that suggested opening PRs (squad-lint is read-only)
- Add git-pr to dependencies.skills since Setup references git-pr Mode C
- Bump version 1.0.0 → 1.0.1

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove duplicate Changed block from squad-forge CHANGELOG v1.0.3

The "Remove Output Schema from Creating a Squad step list" entry was
already recorded in v1.0.2. Remove the duplicate Changed section from
v1.0.3, keeping only the Added block (debrief hint).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: squad-lint v1.0.2 — correct prereq check, hooks paths, SETUP.md path

- Phase 1: add prereq file-existence check for SKILL.md frontmatter
- Phase 3: fix hooks paths (skills only, not squads; <name>.json + <name>-scripts/)
- Phase 5: fix SETUP.md path to skills/*/references/SETUP.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: squash squad-lint version to 1.0.0

Consolidate squad-lint versions (1.0.0 → 1.0.1) into a single 1.0.0
initial release. All changes occurred pre-merge on the same PR, so
multiple version bumps are unnecessary.

- MANIFEST.md: version 1.0.1 → 1.0.0
- CHANGELOG.md: merge 1.0.1 fixes into 1.0.0 entry

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add version bump lint rule and update debrief hint

Add one-version-per-PR check to Phase 4 CHANGELOG Validation.
Update debrief hint to dispatch fix operations on failures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
style: slate-200 light theme with improved contrast and vibrant pieces

- Surface: slate-200 app → slate-100 cards → slate-50 inputs
- Edges: slate-300 (was gray-200) for visible borders on cards/inputs
- Content: slate-600 secondary, slate-500 muted (was gray-500/400)
- Status-muted: slate-400 (was gray-300) for readable player status
- Piece colors: Tailwind 400-level (was 200-300) for both themes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add suggested specification docs (#58)

* Consolidate TeamsActivity-related types into single file per language

Merge TeamsActivityBuilder, TeamsChannelData, TeamsConversation, and related
types (TenantInfo, ChannelInfo, TeamInfo, MeetingInfo, NotificationInfo) into
the main TeamsActivity file in each language:

- .NET: TeamsActivity.cs now contains all Teams types
- Node: teams-activity.ts now contains all Teams types
- Python: teams_activity.py now contains all Teams types

Deleted redundant files:
- dotnet: TeamsActivityBuilder.cs, TeamsChannelData.cs, TeamsConversation.cs
- node: teams-activity-builder.ts, teams-channel-data.ts, teams-conversation.ts
- python: teams_activity_builder.py, teams_channel_data.py, teams_conversation.py

All tests pass across all three languages.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add suggested specification docs

Create the six documentation files listed in the README as suggested
additional docs:

- specs/ActivityPayloads.md — Annotated JSON examples for each activity type
- specs/Configuration.md — Per-language configuration reference
- specs/Middleware.md — Middleware spec with patterns and cross-language ref
- specs/ProactiveMessaging.md — Proactive messaging via ConversationClient
- specs/Samples.md — Walkthrough of all samples with annotated code
- specs/Contributing.md — Behavioral invariants, CI, and new language porting

Update README.md to link to the new docs (replacing the suggested list)
and update specs/README.md to include the new docs in the spec table.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

commit.message:
ci: name portable artifact with version and commit hash (#12995)

Derive the GHA artifact name from the actual zip filename produced by
the CreatePortable MSBuild target, so the artifact appears in the GHA
UI as e.g. GitExtensions-Portable-x64-7.0.0.61-1b6954a rather than
the generic 'portable'.

Addresses feedback in #12983.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(ui): Sprint 28D — deferred polish with press feedback, chip indicators, toast animations, info teal tokens, empty state gradient, mobile FAB

- Add press-feedback utility (active scale) on action buttons and chips
- Add chip-selected-indicator underline on active card chip

- Add mobile FAB for quick benefit addition (conditional on cards > 0)
- FAB uses inline calc() for iOS safe-area bottom positioning
- Remove dead toast-out animation code
- Fix press-feedback transition not killing Tailwind transitions

commit.message:
docs: add PlantUML class diagram of LSP server architecture

Comprehensive UML class diagram covering:
- Server core (lifecycle, document sync, diagnostics)
- 5 services (ValidationPipeline, CatalogValidation, RngValidation,
  KeySpace, SubjectScheme) with interfaces
- 13-phase validation pipeline with phase handlers
- 11 LSP language feature modules (completion, hover, definition, etc.)
- Utility modules (xmlTokenizer, textUtils, referenceParser, i18n)
- Data modules (ditaSchema, ditaSpecialization)
- All relationships: implements, owns, uses, wires

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Tournament mode — single-elimination bracket with 8/16 players, Firestore sync, champion badge and scoring (#84)

* feat: implement tournament mode single-elimination bracket

- Add domain models: TournamentPlayer, TournamentMatch, TournamentStatus, Tournament
- Add TournamentRepository interface
- Add CreateTournamentUseCase and AdvanceTournamentUseCase
- Add FirestoreTournamentRepository with Firestore sync
- Add TournamentViewModel, TournamentSetupScreen, TournamentBracketScreen
- Add tournament navigation routes and menu button
- Add unit tests for CreateTournamentUseCase and TournamentViewModel

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: cancleeric <9006516+cancleeric@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove repositories block from core/build.gradle.kts

FAIL_ON_PROJECT_REPOS is set in settings.gradle.kts dependencyResolutionManagement.
mavenCentral() is already declared there and applies to all modules including :core.
Adding a project-level repositories block causes a build failure.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: cancleeric <9006516+cancleeric@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Hurricane CTO <hurricane-cto@hurricanedigital.com>

commit.message:
Add top 10,000 canonical baseball card database

Comprehensive seed database covering 481 players across 368 set-years
from 17 manufacturers, spanning 1909 T206 to 2025 modern releases.

- Generator script (scripts/generate_top_cards.py) with full player
  database organized by era and importance tier (1-5)
- 151 hand-curated key cards with exact card numbers (T206 Wagner,
  1952 Topps Mantle #311, 1989 UD Griffey #1, etc.)
- 1,758 rookie cards identified and flagged
- Covers all major sets: Topps, Bowman, Fleer, Donruss, Upper Deck,
  Score, Topps Chrome, Bowman Chrome, SP, Finest, Heritage, Prizm
- Decade distribution: 1900s-1940s (299), 1950s-70s (1,406),
  1980s-90s (3,864), 2000s-20s (4,444)
- Seed function skips duplicates (39 iconic cards already existed)
- All 118 tests pass

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: debug issue reporter shows stale version after upgrade (#8635)

After a ChurchCRM upgrade, the auto-collected debug details (POST
`/issues`) reported the old version because the session variable
`$_SESSION['sSoftwareInstalledVersion']` was only written once per
session — existing sessions never picked up the new version.

## Changes

- **`src/api/routes/system/system-issues.php`** — Replace
`$_SESSION['sSoftwareInstalledVersion']` with a direct call to
`VersionUtils::getInstalledVersion()`. The endpoint now always reports
the live installed version regardless of session age.

- **`src/ChurchCRM/Bootstrapper.php`** — Remove the `!isset()` guard so
the session variable is refreshed on every bootstrap. This keeps all
other consumers (`Footer.php`, `Header.php`, `PluginManager.php`,
`NotificationService.php`) in sync post-upgrade. Overhead is negligible
— `VersionUtils` already has a static in-process cache.

```php
// Before — stale after upgrade
'ChurchCRM Version |' . ($_SESSION['sSoftwareInstalledVersion'] ?? 'unknown') . "\r\n"

// After — always current
'ChurchCRM Version |' . VersionUtils::getInstalledVersion() . "\r\n"
```

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: DawoudIO <554959+DawoudIO@users.noreply.github.com>

Consolidate TeamsActivity-related types into single file per language (#57)

Merge TeamsActivityBuilder, TeamsChannelData, TeamsConversation, and related
types (TenantInfo, ChannelInfo, TeamInfo, MeetingInfo, NotificationInfo) into
the main TeamsActivity file in each language:

- .NET: TeamsActivity.cs now contains all Teams types
- Node: teams-activity.ts now contains all Teams types
- Python: teams_activity.py now contains all Teams types

Deleted redundant files:
- dotnet: TeamsActivityBuilder.cs, TeamsChannelData.cs, TeamsConversation.cs
- node: teams-activity-builder.ts, teams-channel-data.ts, teams-conversation.ts
- python: teams_activity_builder.py, teams_channel_data.py, teams_conversation.py

All tests pass across all three languages.

Co-authored-by: rido <rido@no-mail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
